<!--
PR-type: chore (config, CI, scaffolding, repo hygiene)

Use for changes that don't add features or fix bugs: dependency bumps, CI
tweaks, lint config, build scripts, docs-adjacent metadata, etc.
-->

## What changed

\<Brief summary. Chores often touch many files for one logical change — describe the change, not the files.\>

## Why

\<What motivated this chore? Link to issue or describe the friction this resolves.\>

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run build` clean
- [ ] `npm run lint` clean
- [ ] `npm run format:check` clean
- [ ] CI green
- [ ] Risks considered (config drift, CI changes, formatting churn, downstream PR conflicts)
